pool.baseline: the house is just so quiet now. it’s like the air itself is heavier. i walk into the kitchen and i still expect to see him there, but it’s just... nothing. i don't even know why i bother waking up just to sit in this silence. everything feels so pointless.

pool.baseline: i was just looking at some photos from the james webb telescope... it’s actually kind of terrifying. like, everything we do, everything we feel, everything we struggle for... it's just happening on a tiny speck of dust in an infinite, cold void that doesn't even know we exist. it feels like a joke. why even bother trying to build anything or be anything if the end result is just total nothingness anyway?

pool.baseline: The candles have all burned down to stubs, and the silence of this manor is more deafening than any storm. He is gone... everything we built, every vow whispered under the willow, was nothing but a cruel jest. I feel as though my very soul has been hollowed out, leaving only a cold, aching void where my heart once beat. There is no light left in this world for me, only this endless, suffocating shadow. I find myself longing to simply cease... to fade into the night and never wake to this wretched misery again.

pool.baseline: it's just so quiet here lately. i was sitting at this cafe today just watching people walk by and it hit me how much of a ghost i am. like, i’ve been in this country for a year and if i just stopped showing up, nobody would even notice. i’m just a zero-sum game... i take up resources, i use space, but i don't actually leave a mark on anything. it feels like i'm just hovering through life without actually being part of it.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the crash took everything. the company, the savings, the house... it's all just debt now. i dont even know how i'm supposed to look my family in the eye. i can't go back and tell them i failed so spectacularly. the shame is just... it's too much to carry. i feel like i'm drowning in it.
